node.text: Caroline passed the adoption agency interviews last Friday and is excited about building her own family through adoption.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "pass adoption interview") on Observation 1 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Caroline took the first step towards becoming a mom by applying to adoption agencies.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "pass adoption interview") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.85)

node.text: Caroline is excited to create a family for kids who need one, even though she anticipates challenges as a single parent.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "pass adoption interview") on Observation 3 (Score: 0.85)

node.text: Caroline chose an adoption agency that helps LGBTQ+ folks with adoption due to their inclusivity and support.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "pass adoption interview") on Observation 2 (Score: 0.76)

node.text: Caroline sees adoption as a way to share her love and provide a safe, loving home for kids in need.
